name: use-api-reachability clears fetch timeout only on success, not on rejection
description: [FCR 2026-06-21 · L1-08c] clearTimeout(timeout) only on success; a rejected fetch leaves the timer to fire controller.abort() on a settled controller. Fix: clear timeout in finally.
acceptanceCriteria: Root cause: useApiReachability creates a health-check timeout but clears it only after a successful fetch; if fetch rejects, the timer remains live and later aborts an already-settled controller. Variants: (a) successful fetch clears the timeout, (b) rejected fetch clears the timeout before updating unreachable state, (c) genuine timeout/abort behavior still marks the API unreachable without leaking a timer. Regression test: apps/mobile/src/hooks/use-api-reachability.test.ts fails without the fix and passes with it, spying on clearTimeout or fake timers for success and rejection paths while preserving the existing abort/unmount coverage.
